_doc: Addendum to my prior ownership-tier QA. Corrects the too-broad rule 'branded_dso/stealth_dso + pe_backed!=true -> dentist_multi'. Per the user's taxonomy correction, pe_backed (PE/financial sponsor) is ORTHOGONAL to DSO status (organizational/MSO/platform structure). This file re-reviews EVERY row I downgraded from branded_dso or stealth_dso to dentist_multi and restores the DSO tier wherever MSO/management-company/centralized-DSO-platform/established-DSO-brand/friendly-PC evidence exists, even when pe_backed=false. Local-name shells supported ONLY by AO-reach/structural correlation (no documentary brand/locator match) are routed to undetermined (needs_more_evidence), never left as dentist_multi.
written_for: Reset + Consolidation Gate Owner (4th session) — staged evidence, no DB writes
constraints_honored: EVIDENCE FILE ONLY — no DB writes, no ownership_tier writes, no LEDGER/PROGRESS mutation
prior QA files NOT mutated (addendum only)
consolidation remains FROZEN until the wave-1 349-row reset is confirmed complete
did NOT use 'ownership_tier IS NULL' as remaining-work state

supersedes_in_these_files.ownership_evidence_QA_20260621.json: the 25 corrected_tier_if_obvious=dentist_multi (branded/stealth) rows (BELKIC x13 + AQEL x12)

refined_rule.pe_backed: orthogonal boolean badge; NEVER by itself a reason to set or unset a DSO tier
refined_rule.branded_dso: DSO/platform/management-company structure OR established DSO brand IS the NPPES name; even if family-owned / non-PE
refined_rule.stealth_dso: local/friendly-PC name backed or managed by a DSO/MSO/PE platform
refined_rule.dentist_multi: dentist-owned multi-location with NO separate DSO/MSO/platform structure (Consolidated, not DSO)
refined_rule.restore_if: documentary MSO / management-company / centralized-DSO-platform / established-brand / locator / friendly-PC evidence present
refined_rule.needs_more_evidence_if: only AO-reach / structural correlation (no documentary brand/locator match) — AO reach is a candidate signal, not ownership proof
refined_rule.keep_QA_correction_if: evidence shows dentist-owned multi-location with NO platform/MSO (none found in this set)

summary.headline_effect: All restore_DSO_tier rows move OUT of dentist_multi (Consolidated, not DSO) and BACK INTO branded_dso/stealth_dso (Consolidated AND DSO/PE). They were already Consolidated either way, so the Consolidated headline (T2+T3+T4+T5) is unchanged; the DSO/PE-only headline (T4+T5) GROWS by the restored count. needs_more_evidence rows leave dentist_multi for undetermined -> they drop OUT of both headlines until verified.
summary.note: 0 rows survive as dentist_multi: every downgrade I made was to an established multi-location DSO brand / friendly-PC / MSO platform, confirming the prior rule was systematically too broad. The only rows not restored are 4 local-name AO shells held for documentary verification.

liveness_caveats.note: Restored branded_dso (Wolff Dental acquisition 2022). Source dossier also notes a Homewood-location closure — gate owner should confirm this specific address is still operating before consolidating; tier is correct if live.

open_followup_not_acted: The Wave-2 reach5 sign-off (ao_network_evidence_reach5_QA_signoff_20260621.json) recorded '0 corrections' but its regate baked in the SAME too-broad branded+pe!=true->dentist_multi rule. Its 52 dentist_multi candidate rows may likewise need DSO-structure re-review. NOT acted on here (separate file, separate wave); surfaced for the gate owner.

rows.reasoning: Fleet B classified this branded_dso on documentary locator evidence to the 'sonrisa-cdca' brand. My prior QA wrongly downgraded it to dentist_multi solely because pe_backed!=true. Under the corrected taxonomy, pe_backed is orthogonal to DSO status: this is an established multi-location DSO brand / friendly-PC / MSO platform with a documentary locator or management-entity match, so the DSO tier stands regardless of PE backing.
